_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Develop Disaster Recovery and Continuity of Operations plans for systems under development and ensure testing prior to systems entering a production environment.
reference_document_element_description: Build and maintain automated data pipelines with version-controlled transformations, automated testing, environment parity between development and production, and deployment processes that enable rapid iteration without production risk.
comments: DCWF task intersects with WIDAI DA domain. DA-T-011 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: TF-T-005 (TF, cosine: 0.516), RM-T-003 (RM, cosine: 0.499).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 5.0/10 (raw 0.498). Shared vocabulary: [development, environment, production, testing]. DCWF-only terms [continuity, develop, disaster, ensure, entering, operations] vs WIDAI-only terms [automated, build, controlled, data, deployment, enable] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.862 (P=0.863, R=0.861). Balanced P/R — the 22-word DCWF element and 27-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (98.4%). "Develop Disaster Recovery and Continuity of Operations plans for systems under d" and "Build and maintain automated data pipelines with version-controlled transformati" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.530 ≈ STS 0.498 (gap 0.032). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [development, environment, production, testing] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 12.8%. Shared tokens: [development, environment, production, testing]. DCWF-only: [continuity, develop, disaster, ensure, entering, operations]. WIDAI-only: [automated, build, controlled, data, deployment, enable].
